title: Is Paula Badosa retiring at 28? Injury struggles and ranking fall outside top 100 raise concern after emotional message
summary_full: Paula Badosa is facing one of the toughest phases of her career with injury, ranking drop, and mental struggles. After falling outside the top 100, she shared emotional thoughts about fear and self-doubt. Despite her split with Stefanos Tsitsipas and ongoing pain, she says she will keep fighting and believes she can return stronger again.
